descriptions.whatIsP1: Line deduplication removes duplicate lines from text, keeping only the first occurrence of each unique line. The original order is preserved.
descriptions.howP1: Paste your text in the input area. The result updates in real time. Use the options to control comparison behavior.
descriptions.howCase: Case Sensitive: When checked, 'Hello' and 'hello' are treated as different lines.
descriptions.howTrim: Trim Whitespace: When checked, leading and trailing spaces are ignored during comparison.
descriptions.howEmpty: Remove Empty Lines: When checked, empty lines and whitespace-only lines are removed.
descriptions.useCasesP1: Removing duplicate entries from log files.
descriptions.useCasesP2: Cleaning up configuration files with repeated directives.
descriptions.useCasesP3: Deduplicating rows in CSV data before processing.
